meaning: Small Computer System Interface,小型计算机系统接口
examples: It also manages SCSI-specific error recovery.
All SCSI commands should also contain a control byte.
Status: SCSI status byte as defined by the SCSI standard.
The SCSI Trade Association (STA) is a trade group promoting the use of SCSI storage interfaces.
The SCSI interface (and its cousin SATA) is the most widespread enterprise storage interface.
